_meta.notes: Project pages share a layout: title + location, hero/gallery images, lead heading + intro paragraph, 'Project Details' sidebar (client, size, completion date, services, industries), three-section narrative under 'We listen. / We design. / We deliver.' headings (may be absent on shorter projects), and a Similar Projects list. Test-fits sub-pages (/project/test-fits/{n}/) reuse this template with 'Various' style placeholders for client/size/date and feature an individual test-fit's images.

prompt: Extract structured fields from a warehausae.com project detail page. Capture the title, location, hero gallery, intro prose, project facts (client, size, completion date), the services and industries the project belongs to, the three-act narrative (we listen / we design / we deliver) if present, awards if mentioned, and the related projects list. Preserve URLs, including service and industry links. The full body prose should also be captured verbatim so a Bard field can recreate it.
systemPrompt: You are extracting one project page from warehausae.com. Use null or empty arrays for missing fields. Do not invent client names, sizes, or dates.

title.description: The project title shown in the H1.

location.description: Location string under the title (e.g. 'York, PA', 'Various Locations', 'Lancaster, PA').

lead_heading.description: The H2 introducing the project narrative (e.g. 'Extensive expansion at York Hospital'). May be missing on short pages.

intro_prose.description: Paragraph(s) of body copy immediately after the lead heading, joined with double newlines.

narrative.description: Three-section narrative present on most project pages. Leave any sub-field empty if not on the page.

client.description: Client name from the Project Details sidebar.

size.description: Project size as displayed (e.g. '50,000 sf', 'Undisclosed', 'Various Projects').

completion_date.description: Completion date as displayed (e.g. 'Spring 2023', 'Estimated Spring 2025', 'Various Dates'). Preserve the literal string; do not coerce to a Date.

url.description: Absolute URL to the linked service page (e.g. /service/architecture/).

services_provided.description: Services listed under 'Services' in the Project Details sidebar.

url.description: Absolute URL to the linked industry page.

industries.description: Industries listed under 'Industries' in the Project Details sidebar.

awards.description: Award lines if shown on the page (e.g. 'Preservation Pennsylvania Award Winner'). Absent on most projects.

hero_image_url.description: URL of the first/primary image at the top of the page.

alt.description: Alt text or caption text shown with the image.

gallery_images.description: All images that appear on the project page. Deduplicate by URL — galleries on this site often repeat the same images twice in markdown.

related_projects.description: Similar Projects list at the bottom of the page. Deduplicate by URL.

is_test_fits_subpage.description: True only when the URL is /project/test-fits/{n}/ (an individual test fit). False for ordinary projects and for the parent /project/test-fits/ index page.
